data.name: 精靈之心的守護者
data.detailed_description:
精靈之心的守護者是一款瑟瑟的美少女塔防遊戲

<遊戲劇情>

作為人類與精靈混血的玩家是精靈們所居住的世界樹中，居於底層的地下組織成員，暗中守護著大樹根地下貧民區的和平，然而組織卻出現了叛徒導致大量的黑泥狀生物汙染侵蝕著家園。

為了解決事件，玩家所扮演的主角受到了女神的啟示，一路上需要與各式各樣的精靈少女一同作戰，擊碎幕後黑手的野心。

在男性精靈生育能力下降的現況，身為人類混血的主角似乎成為了被盯上的目標?!

輕鬆搞笑的日常劇情搭配臉紅心跳的CG事件，還有動態的視覺享受。

<塔防戰鬥>

每個角色都代表著一座砲塔，有著自己的數值與能力差異，可以透過在戰鬥中消耗資源升級，並發動強大的技能。

除此之外，女神也不只是擺設而已，有著可以治癒全體友軍的女神技能。

當然除了強大的友方外，作為敵人的黑泥也有著多樣化的姿態跟棘手的能力，如何配置應對全靠玩家來思考決定!

<好色的女角色們>

本作有著6名可以發生進一步關係的精靈美少女，她們有著各自的勁爆身材與性格魅力點。

  • 艾蕾娜

組織的殺手後輩

個性 : 主角在組織的直屬後輩、被主角收養後視主角為主人、感情反應低、高冷（對主角以外的人）

  • 莉希雅

風俗店的老闆

個性 : 大齡剩女(以精靈的年紀而言算老，但外觀還是很漂亮)、拜金（精）、喜歡做實驗，喜歡年輕男性人類。

  • 愛麗絲

公主護衛隊隊長

個性 : 個性很差的女貴族，對待除了自己認可的人以外的對象時，態度很囂張，非常看不起弱者，但實際上是個喜歡被羞辱的人。

  • 艾爾芙·斯塔瑪娜

第七代繼承"艾爾芙"之名的公主

個性 : 樂天派、很單純的女孩，武技很精湛，是個大喇喇的女性，即使是公主也不會過於矜持，能夠很快和周圍的人打成一片，但並非沒有常識，偶爾也會有心思細膩的一面。

  • 梅莉

奴隸商所俘虜，製造出來的改造人

個性 : 雖然沒有什麼感情波動，而且很少發言，但還是有自己的主見。

進入隊伍之後將主角視為老大，稱其為主人。

  • 艾爾芙·安娜塔希雅

世界樹的女神，精靈之里的初代女王

個性 : 大家的媽媽，是個很隨興的女神，但確實愛著自己的孩子，重視約定。偶爾有些調皮的地方，有種傻氣大姊姊的感覺。

data.short_description: 《精靈之心的守護者》是一款瑟瑟的美少女塔防遊戲。一股黑暗正在侵染蔓延著世界樹，戰火的帷幕已經揭開，為了拯救女神跟精靈之里的住民，配置並強化砲台與性格各異的精靈美少女邂逅，善用技能與她們並肩作戰！擊退邪惡的黑泥與奴隸商，制裁背後的黑幕來奪回和平的日子吧！
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 英文*, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 560 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • 儲存空間: ５ GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • 儲存空間: ６ GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound

data.name: Custodes of Elf Hearts
data.detailed_description:
Custodes of Elf Hearts is a lewd tower defense game featuring beautiful elf girls.

<Story>

As a half human, half-elf, the player is a member of an underground organization that resides in the lower levels of the World Tree, secretly maintaining peace in the impoverished district beneath its roots.

However, a traitor within the ranks has led to a disastrous outbreak of black sludge like creatures, corrupting their homeland.

To resolve this crisis, the protagonist receives divine guidance from a goddess and sets out on a journey alongside various elf maidens to thwart the ambitions of the mastermind behind it all.

With the fertility of male elves in decline, the protagonist being a half human has suddenly become a highly sought-after target?!

Enjoy a lighthearted and humorous daily life narrative, paired with blush inducing, heart pounding CG events and dynamic visual experiences.

<Tower Defense Combat>

Each character represents a tower, with unique stats and abilities. By spending resources during battles, they can be upgraded and unleash powerful skills.

In addition, the Goddess is more than just a decoration—she possesses a divine skill that heals all allied units.

Of course, the enemy Sludge also comes in various forms with tricky abilities. It’s up to the player to carefully strategize and deploy the right units to counter them!

<Lewd Elf Heroines>

The game features 6 elf girls with whom you can develop deeper relationships. Each has her own stunning figure and unique personality.

  • Elena

Junior assassin in the organization

Personality: The protagonist's direct subordinate in the organization; recognized the protagonist as her master after being adopted by him; typically cold and aloof (towards people other than the protagonist).

  • Lesia

Owner of a brothel

Personality: An older unmarried woman (old in terms of the age of elves, but still very beautiful), loves money (and sperms), likes to do experiments, and likes young male humans.

  • Alice

Captain of the Princess's Escort

Personality: Very arrogant noblewoman; treats anyone other than those she respects with disdain; looks down on the weak, but secretly enjoys being humiliated.

  • Elfe Stamana

The seventh-generation princess to inherit the name "Elfe"

Personality: Cheerful and simple-minded girl; has excellent martial skills; a very straightforward woman, not overly modest despite being a princess, and can quickly get along with those around her; occasionally shows a delicate side despite usually being sensible.

  • Mellie

Captured slave and modified human

Personality: Rarely shows emotion or speaks much but still has her own opinions. After joining the team, she views the protagonist as the leader and calls him "Master".

  • Elfe Anastasia

The goddess of the world tree, first queen of Elfland.

Personality: Considered to be everyone's mother; a very easygoing goddess who truly loves her children and values promises. Occasionally playful, with a somewhat of a silly big sister vibe.

data.short_description: 《Custodes of Elf Hearts》is a lewd anime girl tower defense game. A darkness spreads, corrupting the World Tree as war ignites. To save the goddess and the Elven Village, strategically place and upgrade turrets, meet charming elf maidens, and unleash their unique skills to fight by your side!
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English*, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows7/8/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core i3
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 560 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • Storage: ５ GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows7/8/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core i3
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • Storage: ６ GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound
